hero.sub: Daily tarot readings, personalized horoscopes, reflective journaling, and personality quizzes — all in one beautifully crafted app.
hero.note: Free to start · No credit card required

features.heading: A complete spiritual toolkit
features.sub: Everything you need for your daily practice, designed to help you grow one day at a time.

tarot.title: Tarot Readings
tarot.desc: Full 78-card deck with 6 spread types. Celtic Cross, Relationship, Career, Shadow Work — choose your focus and pull your cards.

horoscope.title: Daily Horoscope
horoscope.desc: Personalized forecasts with energy scores, love and career insights, planetary transits, and daily affirmations.

journal.title: Reflective Journal
journal.desc: Track mood with 10 emoji moods, tag entries, and link readings to journal entries over time.

quizzes.title: Personality Quizzes
quizzes.desc: MBTI, Enneagram, Big Five, Love Language, Attachment Style — six assessments that shape your experience.

streaks.title: Streaks & XP
streaks.desc: Earn XP, level up through Seeker Ranks, and unlock achievements as you build your daily habit.

birthChart.title: Birth Chart
birthChart.desc: Complete natal chart with planetary placements, aspects, and personalized interpretations.

deck.heading: 78 beautifully illustrated cards
deck.sub: Every card in the traditional tarot, with detailed interpretations for upright and reversed positions.

zodiac.heading: Written in the stars
zodiac.sub: Personalized horoscopes for all 12 signs, updated daily with cosmic precision.

ritual.heading: Three steps. Every day.
ritual.sub: Complete all three to maintain your streak and level up through Seeker Ranks.

horoscope.title: Read Your Horoscope
horoscope.desc: Start with your personalized daily forecast. See your energy score and what the cosmos has in store.

card.title: Pull Your Card
card.desc: Draw a tarot card for daily guidance. Reflect on its meaning and how it connects to your current chapter.

journal.title: Write a Reflection
journal.desc: Journal your thoughts using a guided prompt or free-write. Link your entry to today's reading.

free.a: Yes! Arcana is free with 3 daily tarot readings, daily horoscopes, a full journal, and all personality quizzes. Premium unlocks unlimited readings, all 6 spread types, birth charts, and removes ads.

accuracy.q: How accurate are the tarot readings?
accuracy.a: Arcana uses a full 78-card tarot deck with detailed traditional meanings for every card — upright and reversed. Readings are designed for self-reflection and personal insight.

quizzes.a: Six assessments: MBTI (16 types), Enneagram (9 types with wings), Big Five personality traits, Love Language, Attachment Style, and a daily Mood Check.

privacy.a: Absolutely. Journal entries are stored securely and only visible to you. Premium members can also lock entries with a password.

premium.a: Yes! Arcana is completely free to use. When you're ready, premium unlocks unlimited readings, all spread types, birth chart analysis, and removes ads. You can explore everything before deciding.

web.q: Does it work on the web?
web.a: Yes! Use Arcana right here on the web, or download the Android app for offline support and push notifications.

finalCta.heading: Begin your journey
finalCta.sub: Start your first daily ritual today.

footer.disclaimer: For entertainment and self-reflection purposes only.
